questionText: Provide details of your environmental engagement strategy with your clients.
questionKo: details of your environmental engagement strategy with your clients.을/를 입력하십시오.
simpleHelp: This question provides data users with more transparency regarding an organization's client engagement processes. Data users are interested in understanding how financial services companies are working with their clients to drive environmental action, such as whether organizations encourage their corporate clients to set science-based targets.

options: Clients of Banks
Clients of Asset Managers
Clients of Insurers

guidance.text: This question appears if you select "Yes" in response to column 1 "Engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues" for the row "Clients" of 5.11.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 appears 만약 you select "Yes" in response to 열 1 "Engaging with this 이해관계자 on 환경 이슈" 에 대한 행 "Clients" of 5.11.

guidance.text:
General 
Provide details about your organization's client engagement strategy regarding environmental issues.
This question focuses on corporate clients only.
Add a row for each type of client you are disclosing on. Add multiple rows for the same type of client if you wish to provide different engagement details.
% of client-related scope 3 emissions as reported in 12.1.1 (column 4) 
This column only appears if "Climate change" is selected in column 2 "Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy".
Only include the percentage of customer-related scope 3 emissions reported in 12.1.1 that are attributable to clients participating in the activity selected in this row.
% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value (column 5) 
Provide the proportion of your portfolio covered by the engagement strategy based on the total portfolio value, as reported in question 1.10.
Explain the rationale for the coverage of your engagement (column 6) 
Explain how and why clients were chosen for the engagement selected in column 3 "Type and details of engagement", e.g., exposure to environmental risks and/or opportunities, potential impact on climate change/forests/water, proportion of revenue generated, geographic location, etc.
Client engagement can be either untargeted (undertaken generally with all clients or undertaken with a selection of clients without a basis for the selection) or targeted at specific clients, such as clients in a particular sector with increased environmental risks relative to other sectors. There is a place for both, but targeted engagement may be more effective at driving change in the real economy.
Describe how you communicate your engagement strategy to your clients and/or to the public (column 7) 
Briefly describe the process you have for communicating your engagement strategy, including whether it is publicly available, whether you communicate progress and outcomes of engagements with clients and/or the public, and if so, how.
Roles of individuals at the portfolio organizations you seek to engage with (column 10) 
Select all options which represent the roles in the portfolio organization you aim to engage with as part of your environmental engagement strategy.
Effect of engagement, including measures of success (column 11) 
Discuss the effect of the engagement and how you measure its success.
Include a threshold at which you consider your effect to be successful with regard to the measure of success. For example, if you select "Provide training, support, and best practices on how to set science-based targets," the measure of success could be a 10% increase in clients obtaining validation of their emissions reduction targets by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi).
Define the coverage of your portfolio based on the portfolio value represented by clients participating in this engagement activity.
Include a description of any engagement activity you undertake with clients to manage environmental risks in your portfolio.
Provide examples of positive outcomes achieved. For example, this could include clients reducing GHG emissions in their direct operations or increasing renewable energy procurement.
The description should be organization-specific and include details on the impact of the environmental engagement strategy with your clients.
Describe your escalation process (column 13) 
This column only appears if "Yes, we have an escalation process" is selected in column 12 "Escalation process for engagement when dialogue is failing".
Describe the tactics included in your escalation process, e.g., how you express concerns, making public statements, expressing concerns collectively with other investors or shareholders, speaking at general meetings, exit or threat to exit from the investment and others.
guidance.textKo: 일반 세부 정보를 입력 about 귀사의 client 참여 전략 regarding 환경 이슈. This 문항 focuses on corporate clients only. Add a 행 for each type of client you are disclosing on. Add multiple 행 에 대한 same type of client 만약 you wish to provide different 참여 details. % of client-related Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 12.1.1 (열 4) This 열 only appears 만약 "기후변화" is 선택 in 열 2 "환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략". Only include the percentage of customer-related Scope 3 배출량 보고 in 12.1.1 that are attributable to clients participating in the activity 선택 in this 행. % of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value (열 5) Provide the proportion of your 포트폴리오 covered by the 참여 전략 based on the total 포트폴리오 value, as 보고 in 문항 1.10. Explain the rationale 에 대한 coverage of your 참여 (열 6) Explain how 및 why clients were chosen 에 대한 참여 선택 in 열 3 "Type 및 details of 참여", e.g., exposure to environmental 리스크 및/또는 기회, potential impact on 기후변화/forests/수자원, proportion of 매출 generated, geographic location, etc. Client 참여 can be either un목표ed (undertaken generally with all clients 또는 undertaken with a 선택 of clients without a basis 에 대한 선택) 또는 목표ed at specific clients, such as clients in a particular sector with 증가 environmental 리스크 relative to other sectors. There is a place for both, but 목표ed 참여 may be more effective at driving change in the real economy. 설명 how you communicate your 참여 전략 to your clients 및/또는 to the 공개 (열 7) Briefly 설명 the 프로세스 you have for communicating your 참여 전략, 포함 whether it is 공개되어 있음, whether you communicate progress 및 outcomes of 참여s with clients 및/또는 the 공개, 및 만약 so, how. Roles of individuals at the 포트폴리오 organizations you seek to engage with (열 10) Select all options which represent the roles in the 포트폴리오 organization you aim to engage with 의 일부로 your environmental 참여 전략. Effect of 참여, 포함 measures of success (열 11) Discuss the effect 의 참여 및 how you measure its success. Include a threshold at which you consider your effect to be successful with regard to the measure of success. For example, 만약 you select "Provide training, support, 및 best practices on how to set science-based 목표," the measure of success could be a 10% increase in clients obtaining validation 의ir emissions reduction 목표 by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 (SBTi). Define the coverage of your 포트폴리오 based on the 포트폴리오 value represented by clients participating in this 참여 activity. Include a description of 하나 이상 참여 activity you undertake with clients to manage environmental 리스크 in your 포트폴리오. Provide examples of positive outcomes achieved. For example, this could include clients reducing 온실가스 배출량 in their 직접 운영사업장 또는 increasing 재생에너지 procurement. The description 해야 합니다 be organization-specific 및 include details on the impact 의 environmental 참여 전략 with your clients. 설명 your escalation 프로세스 (열 13) This 열 only appears 만약 "Yes, we have an escalation 프로세스" is 선택 in 열 12 "Escalation 프로세스 for 참여 경우 dialogue is failing". 설명 the tactics included in your escalation 프로세스, e.g., how you express concerns, making 공개 statements, expressing concerns collectively with other investors 또는 shareholders, speaking at general meetings, exit 또는 threat to exit from the investment 및 others.

guidance.text: Financial services companies have client engagement strategies for environmental issues and undertake engagement with clients to positively affect their own performance and the environment. Banks and insurers engage with their clients and asset managers engage with both clients and investees.
guidance.textKo: 금융 서비스 companies have client 참여 strategies for 환경 이슈 및 undertake 참여 with clients to positively affect their own performance 및 the environment. Banks 및 insurers engage with their clients 및 자산운용사 engage with both clients 및 investees.

guidance.text:
Adaptation : in human systems, the process of adjustment to actual or expected climate and its effects, in order to moderate harm or exploit beneficial opportunities. In natural systems, the process of adjustment to actual climate and its effects; human intervention may facilitate adjustment to expected climate and its effects. ( IPCC, 2018 )
Climate Transition plan: an encompassing instrument that helps organizations to align their climate ambitions. This alignment is achieved by establishing specific strategies and clear accountability mechanisms to track progress. 
Climate transition plan which aligns with a 1.5°C world: a time-bound action plan that clearly outlines how an organization will achieve its strategy to pivot its existing assets, operations, and entire business model towards a trajectory that aligns with the latest and most ambitious climate science recommendations, i.e., halving greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 2030 and reaching net-zero by 2050 at the latest, thereby limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius. Please refer to the CDP Climate Transition Plan technical note for more details. 
Landscape: defined geographic area with common and interacting ecological and socioeconomic characteristics. They may be delineated based on river basins, seascapes, ecosystems, jurisdictional boundaries, or in other ways (adapted from AFi, 2024 ). 
Portfolio: in the context of this questionnaire, your portfolio is your entire collection of your core financing activities and insurance policies that you offer. For banking, this is the entire collection of products, securities and loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For asset managers, this is the entire collection of your products and investments that you hold and/or manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds and investments owned and controlled by your organization. For investment portfolios, asset managers should consider discretionary investments, those where the organization has discretion over investment decision. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products and insurance policies you provide to your clients. 
Target: a specific measurable output to be achieved within a specific timeline. Targets often act as steps towards a wider and long-term corporate goal.
guidance.textKo: Adaptation: in human systems, the 프로세스 of adjustment to actual 또는 expected climate 및 its effects, in order to moderate harm 또는 exploit beneficial 기회. In natural systems, the 프로세스 of adjustment to actual climate 및 its effects; human intervention may facilitate adjustment to expected climate 및 its effects. (IPCC, 2018) 기후 전환계획: an encompassing instrument that helps organizations to align their climate ambitions. This alignment is achieved by establishing specific strategies 및 clear accountability mechanisms to track progress. 기후 전환계획 which aligns with a 1.5°C world: a time-bound action plan that clearly outlines how an organization will achieve its 전략 to pivot its existing 자산, operations, 및 entire business model towards a trajectory that aligns with the latest 및 most ambitious climate science recommendations, i.e., halving greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 2030 및 reaching net-zero by 2050 at the latest, thereby limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius. Please refer to the CDP 기후 전환계획 technical note for more details. Landscape: defined geographic area with common 및 interacting ecological 및 socioeconomic characteristics. They may be delineated based on river basins, seascapes, ecosystems, jurisdictional boundaries, 또는 in other ways (adapted from AFi, 2024). 포트폴리오: in the context of this 질문서, your 포트폴리오 is your entire collection of your core financing activities 및 insurance policies that you offer. For banking, this is the entire collection of products, securities 및 loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For 자산운용사, this is the entire collection of your products 및 investments that you hold 및/또는 manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds 및 investments owned 및 controlled by 귀사. For investment 포트폴리오s, 자산운용사 해야 합니다 consider discretionary investments, those 여기서 the organization has discretion over investment decision. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products 및 insurance policies you provide to your clients. 목표: a specific measurable output to be achieved within a specific timeline. 목표 often act as steps towards a wider 및 long-term corporate goal.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
‘Yes' selected in column ‘Activity undertaken in row 'Banking (Bank)' OR 'Investing (Asset manager)' in question 1.10 OR
‘Yes' selected in column ‘Activity undertaken in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in question 1.10 AND ‘General (non-life)' selected in column ‘Insurance types underwritten' in question 1.10.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy':
Either column '% of client-associated scope 3 emissions as reported in question 12.1.1' OR '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' must be completed for a row to be eligible for Disclosure points.
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Yes' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' AND only 'Life and/or Health' selected in column 'Insurance types underwritten' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in question 1.10 AND 'No' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' in all of the following rows in question 1.10:
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owner)'
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy':
Column ''% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' must be completed for a row to be eligible for Disclosure points.
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) ‘Yes' 선택 in 열 ‘Activity undertaken in 행 'Banking (Bank)' 또는 'Investing (Asset manager)' in 문항 1.10 또는 ‘Yes' 선택 in 열 ‘Activity undertaken in 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in 문항 1.10 그리고 ‘일반 (non-life)' 선택 in 열 ‘Insurance types underwritten' in 문항 1.10. For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략': Either 열 '% of client-associated Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 문항 12.1.1' 또는 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' 완료해야 합니다 for a 행 to be 획득 가능 for 공시 점. 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 행 공개. 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 6/6점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'Activity undertaken' 그리고 only 'Life 및/또는 Health' 선택 in 열 'Insurance types underwritten' in 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in 문항 1.10 그리고 'No' 선택 in 열 'Activity undertaken' in all 의 following 행 in 문항 1.10: - 'Banking (Bank)' - 'Investing (Asset manager)' - 'Investing (Asset owner)' For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략': 열 ''% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' 완료해야 합니다 for a 행 to be 획득 가능 for 공시 점. 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 행 공개. 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 6/6점입니다. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
The following conditions must be met to eligible for Awareness points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in at least one row
- Full Disclosure points awarded
- ‘Yes' selected in column ‘Activity undertaken' for row ‘Banking (Bank)' in question 1.10
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy':
All of the following met - 3 points
‘Clients of Banks' selected in column ‘Type of clients' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Type and details of engagement' AND
'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' in row 'Banking (Bank)' in question 12.1 AND
Either 'Financed emissions' OR 'Other carbon footprinting and/or exposure metrics (as defined by TCFD)' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' in row 'Banking (Bank)' in question 12.1 AND
Any option excluding 'None' OR 'Unknown' selected in either column '% client-related scope 3 emissions as reported in 12.1.1' OR '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
The following conditions must be met to eligible for Awareness points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in at least one row
- Full Disclosure points awarded
- ‘Yes' selected in column ‘Activity undertaken' for row ‘Investing (Asset manager)' in question 1.10
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy':
All of the following met - 3 points
‘Clients of Asset Managers' selected in column ‘Type of clients' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Type and details of engagement' AND
'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' in row 'Investing (Asset manager)' in question 12.1 AND
Either 'Financed emissions' OR 'Other carbon footprinting and/or exposure metrics (as defined by TCFD)' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' in row 'Investing (Asset manager)' in question 12.1 AND
Any option excluding 'None' OR 'Unknown' selected in either column '% client-related scope 3 emissions as reported in 12.1.1' OR '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
The following conditions must be met to eligible for Awareness points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in at least one row
- Full Disclosure points awarded
- ‘Yes' selected in column ‘Activity undertaken' for row ‘Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in question 1.10 AND ‘General (non-life)' selected in column ‘Insurance types underwritten' in question 1.10
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy':
All of the following met - 3 points
‘Clients of Insurers' selected in column ‘Type of clients' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Type and details of engagement' AND
'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in question 12.1 AND
Column 'Disclosure metric' completed in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in question 12.1 AND
Any option excluding 'None' OR 'Unknown' selected in either column '% client-related scope 3 emissions as reported in 12.1.1' OR '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
OR
ROUTE D)
The following conditions must be met to eligible for Awareness points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in at least one row
- Full Disclosure points awarded
- 'Yes' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' AND only 'Life and/or Health' selected in column 'Insurance types underwritten' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in question 1.10 AND 'No' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' in all of the following rows in question 1.10:
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owner)'
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy':
All of the following met - 3 points
‘Clients of Insurers' selected in column ‘Type of clients' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Type and details of engagement' AND
Any option excluding 'None' OR 'Unknown' selected in either column '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to 획득 가능 for 인지 점: - '기후변화' 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 최소 one 행 - 공시에서 최고점 획득 - ‘Yes' 선택 in 열 ‘Activity undertaken' for 행 ‘Banking (Bank)' in 문항 1.10 For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략': All 의 following met - 3 점 ‘Clients of Banks' 선택 in 열 ‘Type of clients' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Type 및 details of 참여' 그리고 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' in 행 'Banking (Bank)' in 문항 12.1 그리고 Either '금융배출량' 또는 'Other carbon footprinting 및/또는 exposure metrics (as defined by TCFD)' 선택 in 열 '공시 metric' in 행 'Banking (Bank)' in 문항 12.1 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 '없음' 또는 'Unknown' 선택 in either 열 '% client-related Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 12.1.1' 또는 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value'. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. 또는 경로 B) The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to 획득 가능 for 인지 점: - '기후변화' 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 최소 one 행 - 공시에서 최고점 획득 - ‘Yes' 선택 in 열 ‘Activity undertaken' for 행 ‘Investing (Asset manager)' in 문항 1.10 For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략': All 의 following met - 3 점 ‘Clients of 자산운용사' 선택 in 열 ‘Type of clients' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Type 및 details of 참여' 그리고 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' in 행 'Investing (Asset manager)' in 문항 12.1 그리고 Either '금융배출량' 또는 'Other carbon footprinting 및/또는 exposure metrics (as defined by TCFD)' 선택 in 열 '공시 metric' in 행 'Investing (Asset manager)' in 문항 12.1 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 '없음' 또는 'Unknown' 선택 in either 열 '% client-related Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 12.1.1' 또는 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value'. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. 또는 경로 C) The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to 획득 가능 for 인지 점: - '기후변화' 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 최소 one 행 - 공시에서 최고점 획득 - ‘Yes' 선택 in 열 ‘Activity undertaken' for 행 ‘Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in 문항 1.10 그리고 ‘일반 (non-life)' 선택 in 열 ‘Insurance types underwritten' in 문항 1.10 For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략': All 의 following met - 3 점 ‘Clients of Insurers' 선택 in 열 ‘Type of clients' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Type 및 details of 참여' 그리고 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' in 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in 문항 12.1 그리고 열 '공시 metric' 완성 in 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in 문항 12.1 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 '없음' 또는 'Unknown' 선택 in either 열 '% client-related Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 12.1.1' 또는 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value'. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. One 행 scored. 또는 경로 D) The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to 획득 가능 for 인지 점: - '기후변화' 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 최소 one 행 - 공시에서 최고점 획득 - 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'Activity undertaken' 그리고 only 'Life 및/또는 Health' 선택 in 열 'Insurance types underwritten' in 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in 문항 1.10 그리고 'No' 선택 in 열 'Activity undertaken' in all 의 following 행 in 문항 1.10: - 'Banking (Bank)' - 'Investing (Asset manager)' - 'Investing (Asset owner)' For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략': All 의 following met - 3 점 ‘Clients of Insurers' 선택 in 열 ‘Type of clients' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Type 및 details of 참여' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 '없음' 또는 'Unknown' 선택 in either 열 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value'. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. One 행 scored. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in at least one row AND
Full Awareness points (per row) must be awarded AND
Any option excluding any 'Information collection' options selected in 'Type and details of engagement'.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy':
'Yes, we have an escalation process' selected in column 'Escalation process for engagement when dialogue is failing' - 3 points
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to be 획득 가능 for 관리 점: '기후변화' 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 최소 one 행 그리고 Full 인지 점 (per 행) 해야 합니다 be awarded 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 하나 이상 'Information collection' options 선택 in 'Type 및 details of 참여'. For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략': 'Yes, we have an escalation 프로세스' 선택 in 열 'Escalation 프로세스 for 참여 경우 dialogue is failing' - 3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다. One 행 scored.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Leadership points:
'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in at least one row AND
Full Management points must be awarded.
For each portfolio in question 1.10 (excluding 'Investing (Asset owner)') where 'Yes' is selected in column 'Activity undertaken', all of the following is met:
- 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy'
- The relevant portfolio type is selected in column 'Type of clients'
- Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Type and details of engagement'
- 'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' in the corresponding portfolio type row in question 12.1
- Either 'Financed emissions' OR 'Other carbon footprinting and/or exposure metrics (as defined by TCFD)' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' in the corresponding portfolio type in question 12.1 (please note: this eligibility criterion does not apply to 'Clients of Insurers'/'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)')
- Any option excluding 'None' OR 'Unknown' selected in either column '% client-related scope 3 emissions as reported in 12.1.1' OR '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'
AND ‘Yes' selected in column ‘Activity undertaken in 1.10 in any of the following rows:
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' AND ‘General (non-life)' selected in column ‘Insurance types underwritten'
Any of the following selected in either column '% client-associated scope 3 emissions as reported in question 12.1.1' OR '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' - 1 point
- '51-75%'
- '76-99%'
- '100%'
OR
'26-50%' selected in either column '% client-associated scope 3 emissions as reported in question 12.1.1' OR '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' - 0.5/1 points
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Yes' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' AND only 'Life and/or Health' selected in column 'Insurance types underwritten' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in question 1.10 AND 'No' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' in all of the following rows in question 1.10:
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owner)'
Any of the following selected in column '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' - 1 point
- '51-75%'
- '76-99%'
- '100%'
OR
'26-50%' selected in column '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' - 0.5/1 points
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to be 획득 가능 for 리더십 점: '기후변화' 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 최소 one 행 그리고 Full 관리 점수를 획득해야 합니다. For each 포트폴리오 in 문항 1.10 (제외 'Investing (Asset owner)') 여기서 'Yes' is 선택 in 열 'Activity undertaken', all 의 following is met: - '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' - The 관련 포트폴리오 type is 선택 in 열 'Type of clients' - 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Type 및 details of 참여' - 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' in the corresponding 포트폴리오 type 행 in 문항 12.1 - Either '금융배출량' 또는 'Other carbon footprinting 및/또는 exposure metrics (as defined by TCFD)' 선택 in 열 '공시 metric' in the corresponding 포트폴리오 type in 문항 12.1 (please note: this eligibility criterion does not apply to 'Clients of Insurers'/'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)') - 하나 이상 option 제외 '없음' 또는 'Unknown' 선택 in either 열 '% client-related Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 12.1.1' 또는 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' 그리고 ‘Yes' 선택 in 열 ‘Activity undertaken in 1.10 in 하나 이상 의 following 행: - 'Banking (Bank)' - 'Investing (Asset manager)' - 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' 그리고 ‘일반 (non-life)' 선택 in 열 ‘Insurance types underwritten' 하나 이상 의 following 선택 in either 열 '% client-associated Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 문항 12.1.1' 또는 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' - 1 점 - '51-75%' - '76-99%' - '100%' 또는 '26-50%' 선택 in either 열 '% client-associated Scope 3 배출량 as 보고 in 문항 12.1.1' 또는 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' - 0.5/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'Activity undertaken' 그리고 only 'Life 및/또는 Health' 선택 in 열 'Insurance types underwritten' in 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in 문항 1.10 그리고 'No' 선택 in 열 'Activity undertaken' in all 의 following 행 in 문항 1.10: - 'Banking (Bank)' - 'Investing (Asset manager)' - 'Investing (Asset owner)' 하나 이상 의 following 선택 in 열 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' - 1 점 - '51-75%' - '76-99%' - '100%' 또는 '26-50%' 선택 in 열 '% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' - 0.5/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다. One 행 scored.

change.question_ko: [국문 번역 검토 필요] Provide details of your environmental engagement strategy with your clients.
change.q2025_text: Provide details of your environmental engagement strategy with your clients.
change.detail_change_types: New dropdown option, Add tags to dropdown option
change.change_summary: New dropdown options added and environmental tags updated so only relevant options appear for each environmental issue.
change.scoring_change_summary:
CC Financial services Disclosure • ROUTE A pre-requisite has been expanded to cross check with question 1.10. • Column names in ROUTE A also updated. • ROUTE B added for life and/or health insurance organizations. Scoring adapted for life and or/health insurance only organizations as these organizations do not see question 12.1 or the resulting child questions. This approach now removes references to these questions allowing the opportunity to receive full credit.
CC Financial services Awareness • ROUTE A and B eligibility updated to clarify that they apply to banking and asset management organizations. • ROUTE C has been split out into two route and the pre-requisite has been updated to cross-reference with question 1.10. • ROUTE D added for life and/or health insurance organizations. Scoring adapted for life and or/health insurance only organizations as these organizations do not see question 12.1 or the resulting child questions. This approach now removes references to these questions allowing the opportunity to receive full credit.
CC Financial services Leadership • Cross check with 12.1 added that requires all portfolios to meet the criteria rather than just one. • ROUTE B added for life and/or health insurance organizations. Check added to Leadership level to encourage organisations who have multiple avenues of engagement to measure the portfolio impact of all portfolios they engage with and report this in 12.1.
F/W Financial services Awareness • Pre-requisite has been updated to require full Disclosure points to be eligible for scoring at Awareness level. Pre-requisite has been updated to align with scoring for Climate Change in this question.
change.daml_summary: Financial services: D 6/6 | A 3/3 | M 3/3 | L 1/1
change.reflected:
2026 question text applied
2026 response type/columns applied
2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked
change.detail_change_typesKo: 신규 드롭다운 선택지, 드롭다운 선택지 태그 추가
change.change_summaryKo: 신규 드롭다운 선택지 추가 및 environmental tags updated so only 관련 options appear for each environmental issue.
change.scoring_change_summaryKo: CC 금융 서비스 공시 • 경로 A pre-requisite has been expanded to cross check with 문항 1.10. • 열 names in 경로 A also updated. • 경로 B added for life 및/또는 health insurance organizations. Scoring adapted for life 및 or/health insurance only organizations as these organizations do not see 문항 12.1 또는 the resulting child 문항. This approach now removes references to these 문항 allowing the opportunity to receive full credit. CC 금융 서비스 인지 • 경로 A 및 B eligibility updated to clarify that they apply to banking 및 asset 관리 organizations. • 경로 C has been split out into two 경로 및 the pre-requisite has been updated to cross-reference with 문항 1.10. • 경로 D added for life 및/또는 health insurance organizations. Scoring adapted for life 및 or/health insurance only organizations as these organizations do not see 문항 12.1 또는 the resulting child 문항. This approach now removes references to these 문항 allowing the opportunity to receive full credit. CC 금융 서비스 리더십 • Cross check with 12.1 added that requires all 포트폴리오s to meet the 기준 rather than just one. • 경로 B added for life 및/또는 health insurance organizations. Check added to 리더십 level to encourage organisations who have multiple avenues of 참여 to measure the 포트폴리오 impact of all 포트폴리오s they engage with 및 report this in 12.1. F/W 금융 서비스 인지 • Pre-requisite has been updated 요구하기 위해 full 공시 점 to be 획득 가능 for scoring at 인지 level. Pre-requisite has been updated to align with scoring for 기후변화 in this 문항.

simpleHelpKo: This 문항 provides 데이터 사용자 with more transparency regarding an 조직의 client 참여 프로세스es. 데이터 사용자 are interested in understanding how 금융 서비스 companies are working with their clients to drive environmental action, such as whether organizations encourage their corporate clients to set science-based 목표.
